name: Lovisa Holdings Limited
analysis: LOV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 46% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$22.8300, stop A$19.8297, target A$25.2800 (0.82:1) — then trail it.
